title: The Prophet Marries Hafsah
description: Abu Ja'far (al-Tabari) says: In this year the Prophet married Hafsah bt. 'Umar, in Sha'ban (which began January 17, 625).'6 She had previously been married to Khunays b. Hudhafah al-Sahmi in the Jahiliyyah, and he had left her a widow.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
